Category: Technology & Telecommunications: Information Technology, Science & Technology, Software, Hardware, Telecom
Who is this for: Business managers, operations managers, project managers, IT managers, customer service managers, business analysts, team leads, department heads
Team or Dept this is for: Operations, IT, Business Operations, Customer Service, Risk Management, Business Continuity
Description: Business impact when AI-dependent services fail.
Prerequisites: A basic familiarity with how businesses use digital services day to day, along with a general awareness of what artificial intelligence tools are, is all that is needed to get started with this course.
Learning objectives: By the end of this course, learners will be able to identify the key causes of AI system outages and explain how service disruptions affect business operations across a range of industries. Learners will also apply practical strategies to assess risk, prioritise recovery actions, and communicate effectively with stakeholders when AI-dependent services become unavailable.
